stemHtml:
Refer to figure. 
You plan a 5 hour flight on 12th March 2017 from Hahn (H) (50°N 007°E) to Brest (B) (49°N 004°W), taking off at 17:00 UTC. The planned cruise altitude must be higher than 3300 feet altitude. At what altitude must the aircraft fly to avoid moderate to severe icing?

options.d: You can't avoid icing on this route
